# PurposeLab Studio

> PurposeLab Studio builds simple, free, ad-free Android apps for the Indian market. Privacy-first tools that do one thing well — no ads, no subscriptions, no data harvesting.

## Apps

- [Crumbs — Your Private Second Brain on WhatsApp](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/crumbs/): Dump notes, ideas, todos, reminders, links, photos and voice on WhatsApp, then ask for any of it back in plain language. Multilingual, private, and calm. Mobile apps coming soon.
- [Folio — Daily Journal & Mood Tracker](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/folio/): Write daily entries, track moods and habits, reflect monthly. Private, offline, with app lock.
- [WaterWise — Drink Water Reminder](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/waterwise/): Stay hydrated with streaks, smart reminders, and one-tap logging. No ads, no paywall.
- [BP Log — Blood Pressure Tracker](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/bplog/): Log readings from your home BP monitor. See AHA-classified trends, 7-day averages, and share PDF reports with your doctor. 100% offline.
- [Hushly — Baby Sleep Sounds](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/hushly/): Soothing sounds to help your baby sleep peacefully. Curated audio, simple controls, no ads ever.

## Key Facts

- All apps are 100% free with no ads, no subscriptions, and no in-app purchases
- Data never leaves the user's device (offline-first architecture)
- Target market: India
- Available on Google Play Store
- Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material 3
- Developer: PurposeLab Studio

## Blog Topics

- [How to Track Blood Pressure at Home](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/how-to-track-blood-pressure-at-home/)
- [Normal Blood Pressure by Age: Chart and What Your Numbers Mean](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/normal-blood-pressure-by-age/)

### Baby Sleep
- [The Science of White Noise for Baby Sleep](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/white-noise-baby-sleep-science/)
- [Why Your Baby Won't Sleep Through the Night](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/baby-wont-sleep-through-night/)

### Journaling & Wellness
- [Why Journaling Fails and How to Stick With It](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/why-journaling-fails-and-how-to-stick-with-it/)
- [Daily Journal vs Mood Tracker: Why You Need Both](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/daily-journal-vs-mood-tracker-why-you-need-both/)

### Hydration
- [How Much Water Should I Drink Daily?](https://purposelabstudio.github.io/blog/how-much-water-should-i-drink-daily/)
